_about: Synthetic but realistic Clinical Data Management JD pool for India CRO + pharma in mid-2026. 10 jobs across Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Remote India. CDM is more remote-friendly than QA/Microbiology. Salaries in INR LPA.

data.job_description: Clinical Data Coordinator role for global CRO. Support eCRF design, edit check specifications, UAT, database lock for Phase II/III oncology and CNS trials. Work in Medidata Rave or Veeva CDMS / Vault EDC. Author Data Management Plan (DMP), CRF Completion Guidelines, Data Validation Specs. Query management, discrepancy resolution, third-party data reconciliation (lab, ECG, IRT). GCP, ICH E6(R2), CDISC SDTM/ADaM awareness. 1-3 years CDM experience or fresh M.Sc with CDM certification.

Senior CDM owning end-to-end data management lifecycle for global trials. Lead study setup (CRF design, edit checks, EDC build in Rave or Inform), midstudy data review, database lock. Manage CDM team of 3-5. Vendor oversight for safety, central lab, IRT data flows. CDISC SDTM and CDASH mapping experience preferred. Strong GCP, ICH E6(R2), 21 CFR Part 11 knowledge. 5-8 years CDM with at least 2 lead-study experiences.

Clinical Data Analyst role supporting Phase I-IV trials. Perform data cleaning, discrepancy management, MedDRA and WHO Drug coding, SAE reconciliation. Build and maintain edit checks in Medidata Rave. Author / review Data Management Plan, CRF Completion Guidelines, Data Validation Specs. UAT for EDC builds. ICH GCP, CDISC standards. 2-4 years CDM experience or strong M.Sc + CDM certification entry path.

Configure and build Veeva Vault CDMS / EDC studies for sponsors and CROs. Author eCRF metadata, edit checks, derivations, study workflows. Maintain library standards aligned to CDISC CDASH. UAT lead. Mentor sponsor users in Veeva CDMS adoption. CSV awareness per 21 CFR Part 11. Programming exposure (SQL, JavaScript) a plus. 3-6 years EDC config experience (Rave, Inform, or Veeva).

Clinical Data Manager II supporting global Phase II/III studies. CRF design review, EDC build in Medidata Rave, edit check authoring, UAT, study lock. Vendor data reconciliation (central lab, ECG, IRT). Author / maintain DMP, CRF guidelines, Data Validation Specs. Use of CDISC SDTM mapping libraries. GCP, ICH E6(R2), 21 CFR Part 11. 3-6 years CDM experience.

Senior CDM role combining traditional data management with programming. Develop SAS / Python scripts for data review, listings, reconciliation. Edit check authoring in Rave Web Services. CDISC SDTM mapping and ADaM awareness. Database lock and post-lock activities. Strong vendor data integration experience (lab, IRT, ePRO). 5-8 years CDM with programming exposure.

Trainee CDM role for fresh M.Sc / B.Pharm graduates with CDM certification. On-the-job training in eCRF design, edit checks, query management, UAT, database lock activities. Use of Medidata Rave or Oracle Inform. ICH GCP, CDISC fundamentals. 0-1 year experience; CDM certification mandatory.

Clinical Database Programmer for global sponsor. Develop, validate, and deploy EDC studies in Medidata Rave Architect. Edit check programming in Rave Web Services / Custom Functions (.NET). CDISC CDASH library compliance. CSV per GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11. SQL for downstream reporting. 4-7 years EDC programming.

CDM Lead for Phase I bioequivalence/PK studies. Own CDM deliverables across multiple studies: eCRF, edit checks, query resolution, database lock. Tight timelines (4-6 week studies). PK lab data reconciliation, safety data integration. CDISC SDTM mapping. Mentor 2-3 junior CDM staff. GCP, ICH, 21 CFR Part 11. 6-9 years CDM with BE/PK exposure preferred.

Entry-level Clinical Data Associate. Perform data cleaning, query management, listing review, vendor data reconciliation under Senior CDM oversight. Use of Medidata Rave, Oracle Inform, or Veeva CDMS depending on study. MedDRA / WHO Drug coding basics. GCP, ICH E6(R2), CDISC awareness. M.Sc Life Sciences / Pharmacy with CDM certification preferred. 0-2 years experience.
